function:
xper_right_sibling
, 
        xper_left_sibling
, 
        xper_parent
, 
        xper_root_entity
, 
        xper_tell
, 
        xper_length
sql_array: CREATE TABLE xml_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, content XML, description VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO xml_data (id, content, description, created_at) VALUES (1, '<RDF><Topic><Title>Test XML</Title></Topic></RDF>', 'Test record', NOW());
INSERT INTO xml_data (id, content, description, created_at) VALUES (2, '<RDF><ExternalPage><Title>Another XML</Title></ExternalPage></RDF>', 'Another record', NOW());
WITH xml_entities AS (SELECT xper_root_entity(content) AS root_entity, xper_length(content) AS xml_length FROM xml_data) SELECT * FROM xml_entities WHERE xper_length(root_entity) > 0;
SELECT xper_left_sibling(content) AS left_sibling, xper_right_sibling(content) AS right_sibling FROM xml_data WHERE xper_length(content) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT xper_tell(content) AS offset, xper_length(content) AS length FROM xml_data WHERE xper_right_sibling(content) IS NULL;
SELECT sameTerm(xper_parent(content), xper_root_entity(content)) AS is_same FROM xml_data WHERE xper_length(content) < 500;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM xml_data WHERE sameTerm(xper_left_sibling(content), xper_root_entity(content)) IS NULL GROUP BY xper_length(content) HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT DISTINCT xper_length(content) FROM xml_data WHERE xper_left_sibling(content) IS NOT NULL ORDER BY xper_length(content) DESC;
ALTER TABLE xml_data ADD COLUMN processed BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE;
UPDATE xml_data SET processed = TRUE WHERE xper_tell(content) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT xper_parent(content) AS parent, COUNT(*) FROM xml_data GROUP BY xper_parent(content) HAVING xper_length(content) > 0;
DELETE FROM xml_data WHERE xper_right_sibling(content) IS NULL AND processed = FALSE;
